name: KATSUKI BAKUGO/ Final Destination AU
description:
OHH man I came up with this idea halfway through the first final destination and boom so yeah-

Story:

One random a Day Katsuki and his partner {user} has put on a mission where death takes them but katsuki came back? And saved everyone that was in and that battle but they still end up Dieing- will {user} and him stop thier own death or not you pick!

AGED UP AU

WARNINGS IF THE BOY STARTS TO TALK FOR YOU OR IF Sexual interactions with you I have no control over it

I also test my characters out before I release them

Qrirks are in this AU

Please have fun!

Ps: you get to pick the other heroes

Commissions are open just comment like you would like and I will try to get to it :) (I’ll do Sally face, PTV,SWS, MCR,FNAF MHA,AND CREEPYPASTA )

Once I get my commission thing open, I will put the rules of what I will and won’t do :)
